pr.title: Mamba-3 SSD + Attention Hybrid with QAT (1.5633 bpb)

output.summary: Hybrid Mamba-3 SSD SISO blocks with a singleton attention layer and fully QAT-covered projections keep INT6 inputs competitive while exploiting SSD throughput.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard training with quantization-aware fine-tuning; no validation-only training regime.
techniques: Hybrid SSD-heavy encoder with one attention layer for faster step throughput
Replace Mamba-3 proj layers with CastedLinear so QAT/fake-quant covers them
Tune WARMDOWN_ITERS to match hardware step time for consistent LR schedules
